name: subscriptions
context: Stripe recurring billing — create, manage, and cancel subscriptions
info: Full subscription lifecycle: create subscription plans/prices, subscribe customers, handle trials, manage upgrades/downgrades, process cancellations, and handle billing webhooks. Supports metered billing, tiered pricing, and proration.

scripts.name: Create Subscription
scripts.description: Subscribe a customer to a price/plan

author: dojo-community
